The gradle-wrapper.jar is NOT included here because it's a binary file.
GitHub Actions will download it automatically.

If building locally, run this once to get it:
  gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.2
Or download from:
  https://github.com/gradle/gradle/raw/v8.2.0/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar
  and place it in this folder as: gradle-wrapper.jar
